titleStmt.title: SII 11.99: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 99. (B.K. No. 245 of 1927-28). SHIRŪR, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SIDDHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged record in Sanskrit belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva and bears the date Śaka 985, Śōbhakṛit (= A.D. 1062-63). It registers that Prabhu Mārasiṅgha who was a votary of the goddess Mahālakshmī (of Kollāpura) granted into the hands of the Mahājanas of the big village Ayuvaḍaka, 2300 gadyāṇas for the renovation, etc. of the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva and for the feeding of Brahmans.
Prabhu Mārasiṅgha figures also in No. 85 (B.K. No. 244 of 1927-28) above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jñānavijñānadēhāya paraḥ kaivalya mūrtta narasaṁghasya
nepōkakṣētrā śrīrvvarddamāruṇa . namasakaḷa samaya
bauddhadhvāntabhānavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithivīvallabha
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷutyābharaṇa śrīmattraiḷōkyamalla
nripakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasa 985 gha varttamāna sōbhakritsa
svastyanantānantakāḷābhyantaratamatamaṁdhakāravinirggata mahāśakti
būdvīpāṁtarggata sivakṣētra mahāpātaka vinasanī viśāḷā pavitrī kṛtōttamāṅga
śatigaṇōpētā Aṣṭāviṁsa yugāvatārā catuśaṣṭhi yōgi parivēṣṭhitā śrī kollāpura
pīṭhādhiṣṭhitā śrī manmahālakṣmī dēbyāḥ pādapadmōpajīviyarappa pāsupatājāryya
sakaḷamahāsthāna prabhu śrī
dharmmaikasaraṇa rsivārādhanatatpara ḻprabhumārasiṅgha
tēna prabhuṇā māra siṁghēna kurvvan durīkritadōṣāya śrīsiddhēśvara dēvasya khaṇḍasphuṭe
ta jīrṇnōddhāra navakarmmārtthaṁ suvarṇnasahaśrakaṁ dattaṁ . Aṁkataḥ gadyāṇa 1000 santa kritya Ayu
vaḍakamahāgrāma Aṁkapaṁcakē byavasthita paṁcasatamahājanē svarṇnasahaśrakaṁ Aṁkataḥ 1000 tasya
drabyasyakaḷāttada[naiḥ .] variṣaṁprati sārddhasataṁ Aṁkata gadyāṇa 150 ta Ācaṁdrārkkaparyyaṁta
varttanairddattēṣu . tēna prabhuṇā mārasiṅghēna viṣṇōrghāsanē sālyōdana saghritaṁ dvādasa brāhmaṇa bhōjanārtthaṁ Ayu
vaḍakamahājanasya Akṣēṇisthityā dattaṁ suvarṇnasatadvayaṁ tasya kāḷāttadhanaiḥ varśaṁprati catvāriṁśa Aṁ
kataḥ gadyāṇa 40 Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ māhājanairddātabyaṁ . tēna prabhuṇā mārasiṅghēna brāhmāṇa satai
banārtthaṁ Aṣēṇi sthityā Ayuvaḍakamahājanasya sva(su)varṇnasahaśraṁ dattaṁ tasya drabyasya kaḷātta
dhanaiḥ svarṇna sataiḥ śrīmahājanē dātabyaṁ . Ēnaivaṁ sākalēṇa mūḷadrabyaṁayu vaḍakamahājanairgrihī
ta svarṇnasatadvayāthikaṁ sahaśradvayaṁ Aṁkataḥ gadyāṇa 2200 kaḷāṁtarēṇa varśaṁpratyā svarṇna
satadvayanavatyādhikaṁ Aṁkataḥ gadyāṇa 290 Ācaṁdrārkaparyyaṁtaṁ mahājanairddātabyaṁ
yē pālayaṁti jagadābharaṇaṁ sudharmmaṁ tē yāṁti mōkṣaṁ suravāsamidaṁ prayatnāt tam nāsayanu pra
saṁprāpya ghōranarakaṁ vipuḷaṁ brajaṁti . likhitaṁ viṣṇu nāmēna . maṅgaḷaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
